codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3011'
path = '/auth/notification-settings'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.get(
    url,
    headers={
        'Authorization': 'Bearer 63adfd8bea624ffab4373f63d5c0fe28e552beaa85e13f11e52d5c6f9e26793b'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)
codeExamples.emojicode:
рҹ“Ұ sockets рҹҸ 

рҹ’ӯ Emojicode HTTP Client
рҹ’ӯ Compile: emojicodec example.рҹҚҮ -o example
рҹ’ӯ Run: ./example

рҹҸҒ рҹҚҮ
  рҹ’ӯ Connection settings
  рҹ”Өlocalhostрҹ”Ө вһЎпёҸ host
  3011 вһЎпёҸ port
  рҹ”Ө/auth/notification-settingsрҹ”Ө вһЎпёҸ path

  рҹ’ӯ Build HTTP request
  рҹ”ӨGET /auth/notification-settings HTTP/1.1вқҢrвқҢnHost: localhost:3011вқҢrвқҢnAuthorization: Bearer 63adfd8bea624ffab4373f63d5c0fe28e552beaa85e13f11e52d5c6f9e26793bвқҢrвқҢnвқҢrвқҢnрҹ”Ө вһЎпёҸ request

  рҹ’ӯ Connect and send
  рҹҚә рҹҶ•рҹ“һ host portвқ— вһЎпёҸ socket
  рҹҚә рҹ’¬ socket рҹ“Ү requestвқ—вқ—
  
  рҹ’ӯ Read and print response
  рҹҚә рҹ‘Ӯ socket 4096вқ— вһЎпёҸ data
  рҹҳҖ рҹҚә рҹ”Ў dataвқ—вқ—
  
  рҹ’ӯ Close socket
  рҹҡӘ socketвқ—
рҹҚү

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3011'
path = '/auth/notification-settings'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.put(
    url,
    headers={
        'Authorization': 'Bearer 63adfd8bea624ffab4373f63d5c0fe28e552beaa85e13f11e52d5c6f9e26793b'
    },
    json={
      "notifyOnConnect": True,
      "discordWebhookUrl": "https://discord.com/api/webhooks/test/test",
      "notifyEmail": ""
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

  3011 вһЎпёҸ port

  рҹ’ӯ Build HTTP request
  рҹ”ӨPUT /auth/notification-settings HTTP/1.1вқҢrвқҢnHost: localhost:3011вқҢrвқҢnAuthorization: Bearer 63adfd8bea624ffab4373f63d5c0fe28e552beaa85e13f11e52d5c6f9e26793bвқҢrвқҢnContent-Type: application/jsonвқҢrвқҢnContent-Length: 106вқҢrвқҢnвқҢrвқҢn{"notifyOnConnect":true,"discordWebhookUrl":"https://discord.com/api/webhooks/test/test","notifyEmail":""}рҹ”Ө вһЎпёҸ request

  рҹ’ӯ Connect and send
  рҹҚә рҹҶ•рҹ“һ host portвқ— вһЎпёҸ socket
  рҹҚә рҹ’¬ socket рҹ“Ү requestвқ—вқ—
  
  рҹ’ӯ Read and print response
  рҹҚә рҹ‘Ӯ socket 4096вқ— вһЎпёҸ data
  рҹҳҖ рҹҚә рҹ”Ў dataвқ—вқ—
  
  рҹ’ӯ Close socket
  рҹҡӘ socketвқ—
